title: poa nemoralis subsp. sichotensis
intro: Poa nemoralis subsp. sichotensis is a subspecies of the wood meadow grass, a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, which can be used to treat various health issues. The plant has been traditionally used to treat digestive problems, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues, making it beneficial for overall health and well-being. The herbal preparations of Poa nemoralis subsp. sichotensis can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
